creator: j@jedi.claranet.fr
text:
diff -urN ports/ftp/pure-ftpd.orig/Makefile ports/ftp/pure-ftpd/Makefile
--- ports/ftp/pure-ftpd.orig/Makefile	Thu Jun 14 10:26:18 2001
+++ ports/ftp/pure-ftpd/Makefile	Thu Jun 14 10:26:31 2001
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	pure-ftpd
-PORTVERSION=	0.98.5
+PORTVERSION=	0.98.6
 CATEGORIES=	ftp ipv6
 MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	pureftpd
diff -urN ports/ftp/pure-ftpd.orig/distinfo ports/ftp/pure-ftpd/distinfo
--- ports/ftp/pure-ftpd.orig/distinfo	Thu Jun 14 10:26:18 2001
+++ ports/ftp/pure-ftpd/distinfo	Thu Jun 14 10:26:47 2001
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (pure-ftpd-0.98.5.tar.gz) = d6656635fd600e20026e7ba231b4ced4
+MD5 (pure-ftpd-0.98.6.tar.gz) = d7e93f2edd42058c13f1e0ab9b23e8a2

Fix: 

The newly released version 0.98.5 introduced a bad bug with uploads : when a
file was overwritten, the previous content wasn't removed.
I'm sorry Peter.
There was no other change in this release, just a 3-liner fix.
How-To-Repeat: -
